_meta.description: Hidden gem candidates — small/micro-cap stocks typically under $12 with 5-10 year structural growth potential in emerging sectors. Think Nvidia in 2016, Amazon in 2003, Tesla in 2012 — before broad market recognition. Price filter ($12 cap) is applied at runtime via yfinance — stocks that have risen above $12 are automatically skipped this run but stay in the pool for future dips.
_meta.criteria: Market cap > $50M, NYSE/NASDAQ listed (Revolut-accessible), real revenue or credible pipeline, in a sector with a structural multi-year tailwind
_meta.removed_bankruptcies: SPCE, NOVA, ASTR, SPWR, NKLA, GOEV, HYZN, ZEV, SOLO, MTTR, APPH, GTHX, BLUE, LTHM, LIVENT, GATO
_meta.removed_misclassified: STLA (large cap), CPER (ETF), VNET (delisted NASDAQ), BGSF (staffing not space), PIRS (pharma not quantum), TRMR (ad-tech not defense), MBOT (biotech not drones), HPNN (bank not energy), SVMK (went private)
_meta.note: Prices move fast in this segment. A stock listed here may be above $12 today — the runtime check filters it automatically. Conversely, a mainstream stock that crashes below $12 is NOT a gem — only the thesis and sector make it one.

ai_and_data_infrastructure.description: AI enablers, niche software, data platforms, edge AI — pre-mainstream recognition phase

quantum_computing.description: Quantum hardware and software — 5-10 year commercialisation horizon, binary risk

space_and_satellites.description: Commercial space, launch services, earth observation, satellite communications

energy_transition_renewables.description: Solar, wind, grid storage, clean energy, sustainable fuels — energy independence thesis

ev_and_next_gen_transport.description: Electric vehicles, charging infrastructure, urban air mobility, autonomous systems

defense_drones_robotics.description: Drone manufacturers, defense tech, autonomous systems, military AI — geopolitical spending surge

biotech_genomics.description: Drug developers, diagnostics, biomarkers — pipeline-driven binary upside

gene_and_cell_therapy.description: CRISPR, gene editing, cell therapy — next frontier of medicine, 5-10y horizon

fintech_insurtech_neobanking.description: Next-gen financial services, embedded finance, digital insurance — disrupting incumbents

critical_minerals_battery.description: Lithium, cobalt, rare earths, copper — EV and grid storage supply chain

agri_food_biotech.description: AgriTech, alternative proteins, food innovation, health & wellness brands

cybersecurity_privacy.description: Smaller cybersecurity players — infrastructure digitisation + AI attack surface expansion

nuclear_and_uranium.description: Small modular reactors, uranium mining, nuclear fuel — baseload solution for AI datacentre power demand

digital_health_mental_health.description: Telehealth, mental health platforms, digital therapeutics, AI-driven drug discovery — post-COVID structural shift

water_and_climate_tech.description: Water scarcity solutions, climate adaptation infrastructure, environmental services — 2B people face water stress by 2050

blockchain_digital_assets.description: Bitcoin miners, blockchain infrastructure — high-beta macro plays on digital asset adoption
